schema_description: Empirical pre-check result for L-Q3-8 cross-scipy-version reproducibility floor hypothesis. Same-scipy (1.17.1) canonical wrapper re-run vs mirror v0.3 bit-exact comparison. Resolves §3.3.1 of OPERATIONAL_CLOSURE.md (anchor 22 v0.1) and provides empirical validation for L-Q3-8.

canonical_rerun_artifact.path: D:/ドキュメント/エントロピー/新膜宇宙論/これまでの軌跡/パイソン/phase_b_step3_jsondump_v1_fast_result.json
canonical_rerun_artifact.role_for_v0_2: candidate Layer C v1.2 content (rename + freeze で type-α reproduction promotion artifact 化)

compare_scope._description: 12 critical paths compared between mirror v0.3 (axis1_q2 scipy 1.17.1) and canonical re-run (axis1_q2 scipy 1.17.1). Sample covers (a) 6 noise-floor paths from cross-scipy comparison vs Layer C v1.1, (b) 6 paper-claim aggregates from v0.1 declaration §2.1-§2.5.

summary.verdict: variant A CONFIRMED — L-Q3-8 same-scipy-version achievement at delta=0 (12 orders below 1e-12 atol)

side_check_header_keyword._description: handoff §10 残存 TODO[step-2] (1) Combined RAR header pattern check.

lq3_8_implication.statement_pre_check: 1e-12 atol is achievable only under same-scipy-version pinning; cross-version drift establishes ~1e-11 effective empirical floor.
lq3_8_implication.validation_strength: strong — 12/12 delta=0 (not merely <=1e-12 PASS but actual bit-exact float)
lq3_8_implication.cross_version_floor_evidence_inverted: Layer C v1.1 (5d9beb04, 2026-04-27 generation) vs current axis1_q2 (scipy 1.17.1) shows 6 paths in [3e-12, 1.3e-11] range; same-version (mirror v0.3 vs canonical re-run, both 1.17.1) shows 0/12 above floor; cross-version floor is therefore confirmed scipy-version-induced not algorithm-induced.
lq3_8_implication.additional_finding: 5-field sub-tol delta (e.g. combined.gc_a0_err delta=1.74e-14, weighted_mean_gc_a0 delta=8.17e-13) observed in cross-scipy comparison vs Layer C v1.1 also collapse to delta=0 in same-scipy comparison; full reproducibility floor is delta=0 under scipy version pinning, not 1e-12 atol gate.
